---
title: "Team Members"
description: |
  Our team includes the founders, research assistants, and campus ambassadors of Get Learn Bioinformatics, working together to support learning, research, mentorship, and community engagement.
listing:
  - id: team
    max-description-length: 500
    image-height: 150px
    fields: [image, title]
    contents: 
    - FM/index.qmd
    - RA/index.qmd
    - CA/index.qmd
    type: grid
    grid-item-border: false
    sort: false
---


::: {#team}
:::
